texto: Baseball isn't just a game. It's life being played out on a field—a field of dreams—on diamonds of green, where players pursuing their dreams try to be the best they can be on the grandest stage of all—where men become boys and boys become men, all speaking one universal language without uttering a single word.
explicacao: Citação de Tom Tatum sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Baseball isn't just a game.
